reviews.comment:
Bueno en primer lugar , quiero decir que está estación de servicio es la única en villa San Agustín de valle fértil. Por suerte está hoy por muy bien , no tenemos problema con los combustibles y lubricentro más bufé y café muy bien atendido.

(Translated by Google)
Well, first of all, I want to say that this gas station is the only one in Villa San Agustín de Valle Fértil. Luckily, it's doing very well today; we have no problems with fuel, and the service is excellent, plus the buffet and coffee are very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpcXBlZ0FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Llegue un dia de casualidad, andaba medio perdido por esa ruta y sin bateria en el celu como para usar el gps, y termine ahi. pare con la idea de cargar el celu un rato para volver a usar el gps y ubicarme un poco, y la verdad el lugar estaba tan tranquilo que directamente me quede cargando el celu y la notebook mientras veia un capitulo de la serie que estaba viendo. me pedi una pizzita, una coca y pase 3 o 4 horas de paz. las chicas que atienden la mejor onda, y aunque parezca una boludez esta estacion de servicio termino siendo una linda anecdota dentro de mi viaje de 6 meses por el pais, habiendo llegado por estar perdido unas horas. de ahi me fui al dique un rato y segui ruta, lindo recuerdo de ese dia!

(Translated by Google)
I arrived there one day by chance. I was a bit lost on that road and my phone battery was too low to use the GPS, so I ended up there. I stopped with the idea of ​​charging my phone for a while so I could use the GPS again and get my bearings, but the place was so peaceful that I just stayed there charging my phone and laptop while watching an episode of the series I was watching. I ordered a small pizza and a Coke and spent three or four peaceful hours there. The girls who work there were super friendly, and even though it might seem silly, this gas station ended up being a nice anecdote from my six-month trip around the country, having arrived there because I was lost for a few hours. From there I went to the dam for a while and continued on my way. A great memory of that day!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDM2ZMZHpRRRAB
